name: hashcat-data
title: hashcat-data
summary: Data files for hashcat advanced password recovery utility
description:
Data files for hashcat advanced password recovery utility
Hashcat is an advanced CPU/GPU-based password recovery utility supporting
seven unique modes of attack for over 100 optimized hashing algorithms.
.
This package contains the data files for hashcat, including charsets,
rules, salts, tables and Python tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use hashcat-data because Data files for hashcat advanced password recovery utility.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use hashcat-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair hashcat-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `hashcat-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
